title: Verify Loss Aversion warning appears when user clicks Cancel Trial
description: Test that clicking cancel triggers the Loss Aversion Exit Gate with warning about losing remaining days
preconditions: User is in Trial Corner Hub

steps.description: 2. Click on 'Cancel Trial' button in Manage Trial section

expected_result: Popup displays 'Wait! Don't lose your free days' headline with message about losing remaining days and shows 'Keep Trial & Set Reminder' as primary action and 'Cancel Anyway' as secondary action
